description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe designed for outdoor or urban use, featuring a streamlined silhouette and robust construction. The upper is primarily composed of synthetic mesh and textile materials in shades of gray, with black overlays providing structural support and durability. The shoe includes a reinforced toe cap, a padded collar, and a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The lacing system is a quick-lace style, utilizing a single elastic cord and toggle for fast adjustment. The outsole is made of rugged black rubber with a pronounced lugged tread pattern for enhanced grip on various surfaces. Subtle branding elements and logos are visible on the side and heel, indicating a focus on both performance and style.
description: A modern gray and black athletic shoe with a quick-lace system, rugged lugged sole, and reinforced overlays, designed for urban and outdoor environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gray mesh upper, black overlays, and visible branding on the heel and side.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the reinforced toe cap, quick-lace system, and streamlined shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the black support structure, heel pull tab, and additional branding.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the padded collar, heel pull tab, and logo placement on the heel.
attribute_logo: White 'S' logo on a black square on the side and heel, and 'X' branding on the lateral side.
attribute_lacing_style: quick-lace system with elastic cord and toggle
